biological_replicate: isolated from CRC patients produced more cysteine‐rich 61 (Cyr61) than those from healthy donors
technical_replicate: the addition of 5 μg·mL−1 anti‐Cyr61 antibody to HCT8 and DLD1 cells reduced the number of invasive cancer cells by 36% and 27%, respectively
experimental_design: ADSCs‐CRC significantly promoted cell invasion and migration
number_of_fractions: no fractionation or pre-fractionation is described
number_of_biological_replicates: isolated from nine healthy donors and 11 CRC patients
number_of_samples: isolated from nine healthy donors and 11 CRC patients
